description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow set within a walled property featuring a spacious driveway, landscaped gardens, and a large tennis court. The main building has a flat roof with decorative geometric patterns and extensive use of glass for windows and doors, providing a sleek, contemporary appearance. The front facade includes a prominent entryway, a garage, and lush greenery with palm trees and flowering shrubs. The backyard area is equipped with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a patio, seamlessly connecting indoor and outdoor living spaces. The tennis court occupies a significant portion of the lot, bordered by manicured lawns and additional trees. The overall design emphasizes open space, luxury, and modern architectural elements.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, a swimming pool, and a tennis court within a walled property.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and lush landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tennis court, rear garden, and the flat-roofed structure with large windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, patio, outdoor seating, and the tennis court in the foreground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the tennis court, side garden, and the modern, geometric roof design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass doors
